gateway_host.name: Gateway Host
gateway_host.description: IP address of the Waveshare RS485-to-WiFi/ETH gateway (e.g. 0.0.0.0)

gateway_port.name: Gateway Port
gateway_port.description: TCP port of the gateway. 502 for Modbus TCP<->RTU mode (recommended).

protocol.name: Protocol
protocol.description: tcp = gateway in Modbus TCP<->RTU mode (recommended). rtu_over_tcp = gateway in transparent mode (raw RTU + CRC over TCP, usually port 8899).

slave_address.name: Slave / Unit Address
slave_address.description: Modbus unit address of the inverter (Solis default: 1)

mqtt_host.name: MQTT Host
mqtt_host.description: MQTT broker hostname. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

mqtt_user.name: MQTT Username
mqtt_user.description: MQTT username. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

mqtt_pass.name: MQTT Password
mqtt_pass.description: MQTT password. Leave empty to auto-detect from Home Assistant.

inter_frame_ms.name: Inter-frame Delay (ms)
inter_frame_ms.description: Minimum gap between Modbus transactions. Solis spec requires >300 ms; 400 ms is safe. Too low causes flaky reads/writes.

enable_control.name: Enable Control
enable_control.description: Expose writable control entities and accept writes. Turn off for read-only telemetry.

max_current_a.name: Max Charge/Discharge Current (A)
max_current_a.description: Hard safety clamp on charge/discharge current writes. Never exceed ~105 A on this inverter (5 kW / ~48 V); 125 A previously caused a standby fault.

export_limit_w.name: Max Export Power (W)
export_limit_w.description: Upper clamp for the backflow (export) power limit write. DNO export approval is 10 kW.

debug.name: Debug Logging
debug.description: Enable verbose debug output (logs every Modbus frame)
